Google engineer: "The robot told me it would like to be treated with respect?"
The whole world with scorn: "wowwww, what a fucking idiotttt"

this one kinda reads to me like global warming- like- even if we're wrong about a particular intelligence's abilities, the downside to this is that we treat all of our AI (sentient or not) with a level of respect and autonomy, I can't see how that makes the world worse
